title: Smelting, Smoking & Blasting!
description: This datapack introduces a bunch of recipes for the Furnace, Blast Furnace and Smoker that should be in the base game!
body:
This datapack introduces a bunch of recipes for the Furnace, Blast Furnace and Smoker that should be in the base game!

## Furnace
### Increased Smelting Times
This datapack adds recipes for the raw ore blocks (e.g. raw iron blocks). To balance these recipes, the smelt time has been extended slightly. Smelting 9 iron usually takes 90 seconds but smelting a raw iron block only takes 46!

![Extended Smelting Times for Raw Ore Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8945dea44c0dc5c8df71f87a9f326601d1688a.png)

## Blast Furnace
The recipes for blasting raw ore blocks is still longer than the average 10 seconds but half of the 46 seconds it takes in a normal furnace!

![Raw Ore Blocks in Blast Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33a08c70849ac542ba7541fc73300357b7bbb02.png)

You can now blast logs into charcoal!

![Blasting Logs into Charcoal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d1119bb62b82484565814946f900bcb9b0d690.png)

Blasting all the different colours of Terracotta into their Glazed Terracotta counterparts!

![Blast all types of Terracotta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59a4d55c5dede67c860f300ce9d6d51542dbcfd0.png)

Blasting Sand to Glass!

![Blasting Sand to Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6ddb2802c224dffd85d93d3079dd71ccb5aa86.png)

Quartz to Smooth Quartz!

![Quartz to Smooth Quartz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776ac82e6083e405ac592eb04cafbd7f518aeec2.png)

These are just some of the blast furnace recipes, check out the rest in game!

## Smoker

Items into dyes!

![Items to dye!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/400ee091752efef08c3d04f3bfdf432df560503b.png)
![Items to dye!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e9d9e38ab29723d03b8de7ce5677b27dae087b.png)

Chorus fruit can be smoked into Popped Chrous Fruit!

![Easy Popped Chorus Fruits!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839ae5336774785f6a8f14f3b6f1144cf95b28c8.png)

# This datapack will be updated with every new recipe added
